articles.title: Securitize aims to raise $400 million as tokenization firm nears public debut
articles.description: The BlackRock-backed tokenization specialist expects to close its SPAC merger next week and start trading on the NYSE, pending shareholder approval.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Framework Ventures raises $400M to invest beyond crypto: Report
articles.description: Framework Ventures raises $400 million fourth fund as it expands into AI, robotics and energy while reportedly planning to continue crypto investments.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE jumps 8.9%, leading index higher
articles.description: Solana (SOL) gained 4.5%, joining Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.

articles.title: Hyperliquid added to Singapore's Investor Alert List
articles.description: Singapore’s financial regulator added Hyperliquid to its Investor Alert List, as a reminder that the decentralized exchange was not licensed in the region.

articles.title: Robotaxis drive miles just to get cleaned and charged; this new startup wants to fix that
articles.description: Aseon Labs, which came out of Y Combinator's 2026 spring cohort, has raised $10 million from Crane Venture Partners and others.

articles.title: Wall Street's IPO revival hasn't reached dot-com euphoria levels, Goldman Sachs says
articles.description: U.S. IPO issuance has rebounded sharply in 2026, but the bank said the current surge lacks the deal volume and speculative excess that defined the dot-com era.

articles.title: Australian regulator extends no-action period for crypto licensing
articles.description: Australia’s financial regulator extended temporary enforcement relief for digital asset businesses until Sept. 30 as firms transition into the country’s licensing system.

articles.title: AscendEX withdrawal complaints mount as ZachXBT questions reserves
articles.description: Multiple users reported delayed AscendEX withdrawals after ZachXBT flagged potential liquidity issues and urged the exchange to explain its reserves.

articles.title: With crypto ending the first half in the red, bitcoin's solace is it beat Strategy
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for June 26, 2026

articles.title: Bitcoin bounces from $58,000 as derivatives signal more pain in the pipeline
articles.description: BTC touched its lowest level since September 2024 before rebounding to $59,770, while ETH slipped further and another $1 billion in futures positions were wiped out.

articles.title: 分析：白宮出重手介入 OpenAI、Anthropic，AI 監管警鐘響起
articles.description: 據傳川普政府因擔心潛在的安全問題，要求 OpenAI 對其模型產品採取階段性發表的方式，進而推遲下一款旗艦模型 […]

articles.title: All eyes on Strategy's June 30 ex-dividend date and monthly STRC dividend rate reset
articles.description: Investors are watching the preferred stock's ex-dividend date and monthly dividend rate reset closely.

articles.title: Binance tells EU users it will no longer provide services after failing to secure MiCA license
articles.description: A day after withdrawing its MiCA license application in Greece and saying it is ‘not leaving Europe,’ Binance notified users across the European Union that it will suspend some services.

articles.title: 台灣自研宇宙觀測系統「VERTECS」登太空，創太空任務里程碑
articles.description: 國立中興大學與清華大學團隊參與開發的立方衛星太空望遠鏡「VERTECS」，12 日搭乘日本 H3 運載火箭六號 […]

articles.title: 日本強化太空防衛，航空自衛隊將更名「航空宇宙自衛隊」
articles.description: 日本參議院今天表決通過法律，將重組航空自衛隊，並將名稱改為「航空宇宙自衛隊」。為因應安全環境快速變化，此舉為強 […]

articles.title: Ethereum treasury firm Sharplink buys ether for the first time in eight months
articles.description: The second-largest corporate ether holder purchased 5,000 ETH worth about $7.85 million on Thursday, its first inflow since October, even as it sits on a paper loss of roughly $1.8 billion.

articles.title: 長榮海運長麗輪荷莫茲海峽遇襲，國際海事組織暫停護航行動
articles.description: 一艘貨輪通報遭到襲擊後，聯合國國際海事組織（IMO）今天暫停護送船隻通過荷莫茲海峽的行動，此舉再度引發外界對結 […]

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs post June's biggest daily outflows as BTC falls below $60K
articles.description: US Bitcoin ETFs recorded $696.3 million in outflows as Bitcoin slipped below $60,000, lifting year-to-date losses to $4.6 billion.
